query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(360104, 'According to 1 John 4:1, believers are commanded to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Accept all prophecies","Test the spirits","Ignore prophetic words","Only listen to apostles"]', 'Test the spirits', 1),
(360104, 'A true prophet''s message will always:', 'multiple_choice', '["Be popular","Align with Scripture","Predict specific dates","Promise prosperity"]', 'Align with Scripture', 2),
(360104, 'Jesus warned that in the last days there would be:', 'multiple_choice', '["No more prophets","False prophets","Only true prophets","Prophets in every church"]', 'False prophets', 3),
(360104, 'According to Deuteronomy 18:22, a false prophet can be identified when:', 'multiple_choice', '["Their prophecy does not come true","They are unpopular","They speak against the king","They perform miracles"]', 'Their prophecy does not come true', 4),
(360104, 'The fruit of a prophet''s life is important because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It determines their salary","It reveals their true character and source","It makes them famous","It qualifies them for leadership"]', 'It reveals their true character and source', 5),
(360104, 'Paul instructs that prophecies should be weighed by:', 'multiple_choice', '["The pastor alone","Other prophets and mature believers","The newest converts","Government officials"]', 'Other prophets and mature believers', 6),
(360104, 'A prophetic word that contradicts Scripture should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Accepted if the prophet is sincere","Rejected as false","Modified to fit","Kept secret"]', 'Rejected as false', 7),
(360104, 'The test of a prophet includes examining their:', 'multiple_choice', '["Educational credentials","Doctrine, fruit, and fulfillment","Financial success","Number of followers"]', 'Doctrine, fruit, and fulfillment', 8),
(360104, 'False prophets often appeal to people''s desire for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Repentance","Comfort without accountability","Deeper holiness","Sacrificial service"]', 'Comfort without accountability', 9),
(360104, 'The Bereans were commended for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Accepting everything Paul said","Examining the Scriptures to verify teaching","Rejecting all new teaching","Following popular opinion"]', 'Examining the Scriptures to verify teaching', 10),
(360104, 'Describe the biblical criteria for testing prophetic words and why this is important for the church.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Biblical criteria include alignment with Scripture, fulfillment of predictions, godly fruit in the prophet''s life, and confirmation by mature believers. Testing protects the church from deception.', 11),
(360105, 'Jesus fulfilled the prophetic office by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Being a political leader","Speaking God''s word with ultimate authority","Establishing an earthly kingdom","Overthrowing Rome"]', 'Speaking God''s word with ultimate authority', 1),
(360105, 'In Deuteronomy 18:15, Moses prophesied about a prophet who would be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Like Elijah","Like Moses himself","Like David","Like Abraham"]', 'Like Moses himself', 2),
(360105, 'Jesus'' prophetic ministry included:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only predicting the future","Teaching, revealing God, and foretelling events","Only performing miracles","Only healing the sick"]', 'Teaching, revealing God, and foretelling events', 3),
(360105, 'The Transfiguration confirmed Jesus'' prophetic authority when:', 'multiple_choice', '["He glowed with light","The Father said Listen to Him","Moses and Elijah appeared","Peter wanted to build shelters"]', 'The Father said Listen to Him', 4),
(360105, 'Jesus prophesied about:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only His death","His death, resurrection, and the destruction of Jerusalem","Only the end times","Only the church"]', 'His death, resurrection, and the destruction of Jerusalem', 5),
(360105, 'As Prophet, Jesus reveals:', 'multiple_choice', '["Hidden mysteries only","The Father and His will","Political strategies","Economic principles"]', 'The Father and His will', 6),
(360105, 'Jesus'' prophetic teaching was characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Uncertainty and doubt","Authority unlike the scribes","Dependence on human tradition","Compromise with culture"]', 'Authority unlike the scribes', 7),
(360105, 'The Olivet Discourse (Matthew 24-25) demonstrates Jesus'' role as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Priest","King","Prophet","Judge only"]', 'Prophet', 8),
(360105, 'Jesus'' prophetic ministry continues today through:', 'multiple_choice', '["New revelations equal to Scripture","His Word and Spirit in the church","Political movements","Human philosophy"]', 'His Word and Spirit in the church', 9),
(360105, 'Hebrews 1:1-2 declares that God has spoken finally through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Angels","Prophets","His Son","The law"]', 'His Son', 10),
(360105, 'Explain how Jesus fulfilled and surpassed the prophetic ministry of the Old Testament prophets.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Jesus is the ultimate Prophet who not only spoke God''s word but is the Word made flesh. He reveals the Father perfectly, fulfills all prophecy, and continues His prophetic ministry through the Spirit.', 11);
command:
